meanings.definition: break into pieces, as by striking or knocking over

examples: My daughter's fancy wedding is going to break me!
The slump in the financial markets smashed him
She smashed her car against the guard rail
She was crushed by his refusal of her invitation
The death of her son smashed her

meanings.definition: damage or destroy as if by violence
examples: The teenager banged up the car of his mother

meanings.definition: hit (a tennis ball) in a powerful overhead stroke
collide or strike violently and suddenly
examples: The motorcycle smashed into the guard rail

meanings.definition: overthrow or destroy (something considered evil or harmful)
examples: The police smashed the drug ring after they were tipped off

meanings.definition: break suddenly into pieces, as from a violent blow
